contract_A_acme_msa_2026.description: Planted-gap case: several clauses deliberately exceed the baseline. Mirrors the tech foundation doc's running scenario (24x7 / P1 / 15-min).

expected_findings.expected_baseline_match: SOW_v1.md Section 4.1 (business-hours L2) + SLA_matrix.md P1 row (next business day)
expected_findings.reason: New 24x7 + 15-minute P1 SLA not covered by baseline
SIEM-based monitoring not mentioned anywhere in baseline (policy_security.md explicitly says none is in place)
New GDPR/EU data-residency requirement stricter than baseline's 'primary region only'
New penalty/service-credit clause not present in baseline; always routes to legal regardless of confidence

contract_B_clean_renewal.description: Control case: clauses match baseline near-verbatim. Used to measure false-positive rate.
contract_B_clean_renewal.note: None of these should be flagged as gaps. Any flag here counts toward the false-positive rate.

contract_C_new_scope.description: No-baseline-coverage case: entirely new scope areas plus a resourcing constraint from skills_matrix.csv.

expected_findings.reason: RTO/RPO commitments not present anywhere in baseline

expected_findings.expected_baseline_match: no baseline coverage found; skills_matrix.csv shows 0 available Security Analyst / only 1 L3 engineer
expected_findings.reason: Named/dedicated on-site resource requirement not covered by baseline or current resourcing capacity
